title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic held an opening keynote at the Code with Claude 2026 conference in Tokyo, featuring engineering and product leaders sharing updates. The event appears to be a major venue for communicating company direction and recent work.
writeup: This video is the opening keynote from Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 conference in Tokyo, where engineering and product leaders present updates. It serves as a venue for communicating company direction and recent work. The summary does not specify which products, features, or roadmap items the leaders covered.
